description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
Win-CodexBar 0.37.3 includes the 0.37.2 Windows port plus post-release cleanup commits.

Highlights:
- Removes unused desktop bridge metadata and demo provider mode.
- Removes dead chart surprise-animation plumbing.
- Removes the fake Copilot budget JSON hook.
